resources.string: When you start Long screenshot, SnapCrop reads the active window structure, performs scroll gestures, and stitches frames locally. Android 14 and later capture only the active app window; Android 11–13 capture the visible display. Temporary frames stay on this device and are never uploaded by the Accessibility service.

During a Step capture session, SnapCrop observes click and long-click events, reads control bounds, and assembles a numbered guide locally. Android 14 and later capture only the active app window; Android 11–13 capture the visible display. Temporary frames stay on this device and are never uploaded by the Accessibility service.
Could not build the step guide.
The previous step guide is still being built.
A step could not be captured; the session is still active.
Step Capture stopped because temporary storage failed.
Step Capture reached its %1$d-step limit and is building the guide.
Step Capture reached its pixel limit and is building the saved steps.
Step Capture reached its memory limit and is building the saved steps.
Step Capture reached its temporary-storage limit and is building the saved steps.
Step Capture reached 10 minutes and is building the guide.
Step Capture stopped after 2 minutes without a step.
Notifications are unavailable. Keep the Step Capture Quick Settings tile available so you can stop safely.
This app protects the active window from screenshots. Switch to non-secure content or stop capture.
Capture switched to a different app window. Return to the original app and restart capture.
Android rejected the active app window identifier. Return to the app and retry capture.
No active app window is available. Open the app you want to capture and retry.
Android is throttling screenshots. Wait a moment, then retry the step.
Accessibility screenshot access ended. Re-enable the matching SnapCrop service before retrying.
The active display is no longer available. Move the app to the main display and retry.
Full photo access is used only to find new screenshots automatically. Pick Image, Batch Crop, and images shared into SnapCrop still work through Android’s picker.
Selected-photo access works in the Gallery, but automatic monitoring cannot see future screenshots. Pickers and sharing still work. Tap below and choose “Allow all”.
The Gallery will not list device videos. Pick Video still works through Android’s picker, and image monitoring is unaffected.
The Gallery can list only videos selected through Android. Pick Video still works for any video you choose, and image monitoring is unaffected.
Screenshot monitoring can run, but detected-screenshot, countdown, Edit, Share, and Quick Crop notifications may not appear. Photo and video access are unaffected.
Optional display-over-apps access lets the editor appear immediately. Without it, the screenshot notification still opens the editor.
Private and ready for your next screenshot
Turn on monitoring to catch new screenshots
Load an HTTPS page locally and send a bounded full-page image to the editor.
Open the editor with auto-crop, redaction, OCR, and export tools.
SnapCrop waits, then opens the next screenshot it detects.
Scroll, stitch, save, and open the result automatically.
Enable Accessibility once, then capture from Quick Settings.
Wrap a screenshot in a polished phone frame.
Trim recordings or grab a frame to edit.
Edit an image or open Gallery to get started.
Screenshots are detected automatically when the monitor is active. Exports follow your format and location settings.
Android will move this exported crop to Trash. The source screenshot is not touched.
This permanently deletes the exported crop. The source screenshot is not touched.
%1$d images will be bundled with metadata.
Use dimensions from 50–500 mm and margins from 5–50 mm, leaving at least 120 mm of content.
Creates a standard PDF. PDF/A is not offered because this renderer cannot validate archival conformance.
[Text truncated at the report safety limit]
Include searchable OCR text and appendix
Review recognized text before creating a searchable report.
OCR corrections are ready for PDF export.
Correct or delete recognized blocks for each image. The reviewed text is used for the searchable PDF layer and appendix.
Configure the network target in Settings
Network upload is off in Settings
Could not open SnapCrop app settings.
A report can contain at most %1$d images.
Report export cancelled; no partial report was saved.
%1$d images will be renamed in place.

Long Screenshot uses Android Accessibility only after you start the action. It captures the visible screen, reads window structure enough to scroll, and performs scroll gestures to stitch frames. Frames stay on this device and are saved to your SnapCrop folder; SnapCrop does not upload or share Accessibility data. You can skip this and still use manual crop, stitch, gallery, and editor tools.

Long screenshot uses Android Accessibility only when you start this workflow. It reads the active window structure, performs scroll gestures, and captures frames to stitch one image. Android 14 and later capture only the active app window; Android 11–13 capture the visible display. Temporary frames and the finished image stay on this device unless you explicitly share or upload the result. The Accessibility service does not upload data. You can cancel and continue using manual crop, stitch, Gallery, and editor tools.

Step capture uses Android Accessibility only during a session you start. It observes click and long-click events, reads the selected control’s screen bounds, and captures each step to assemble a numbered guide. Android 14 and later capture only the active app window; Android 11–13 capture the visible display. Temporary frames and the guide stay on this device unless you explicitly share or upload the result. The Accessibility service does not upload data. Tap the Step capture tile again to stop a session, or cancel now without enabling Accessibility.
Long screenshot requires Android 11 or newer
Enable SnapCrop Long screenshot, then add its Quick Settings tile.
Enable SnapCrop Long screenshot in Accessibility settings.
Enable SnapCrop Step capture in Accessibility settings.
Accessibility settings could not be opened on this device.
Fewer than two valid shared images remain.
Collage supports at most 25 shared images; use Stitch, Batch auto-crop, or PDF instead.
Screenshot detected — tap notification to edit
%1$s output - Save replaces the source screenshot
%1$s output - Save keeps the source screenshot
When ON (default), manual Save deletes the screenshot you cropped from. Android may ask you to confirm deletion.

Save a .snapcrop.json file next to exports so crops, reversible concealment masks, OCR corrections, and layers can be reopened later. The file can contain sensitive recognized text; keeps the source image when enabled.
Save reviewed OCR text as a UTF-8 .txt companion in shared storage for reports and archival workflows. The plaintext file may contain sensitive content.
Use built-in visual templates to strip Reddit, X/Twitter, and similar app chrome during auto-crop.
Opt-in local index for screenshot names, source hints, dimensions, favorites, and categories. Stored only on this device.
PNG is lossless, JPEG/WebP are smaller files
Auto-adjust quality to meet a file size budget
Available when JPEG or WebP is selected
Preserve detected supported fields for this share
Use this as my preselected choice
Could not inspect metadata safely. Nothing was shared.
Could not apply the metadata choice. Nothing was shared.
Video metadata cannot be sanitized without transcoding. This mixed selection can only preserve originals.
Preselect Strip all in share checks and remove private EXIF from saved exports
Select the script for text recognition (OCR, search, redaction). Non-Latin scripts download a model via Play Services on first use.
Capture the current format, quality or target size, border, watermark, filename template, and save location. Choose defaults for the editor and Quick Crop.
Use a unique non-empty preset name (maximum 20 presets).
Save draw tool styles and load them quickly in the editor.
No presets saved yet. Use the + button in the editor\'s draw mode to save your current tool style.
Off by default. Reports stay local unless you explicitly upload from the report dialog.
Imgur uploads selected images, not PDF reports. Anyone with a resulting direct link may be able to view the image; do not upload sensitive captures.
HTTPS WebDAV folder or file URL
Example: Bearer token or Basic credentials. Leave blank for no auth.
Public HTTPS endpoints work without this permission. Android asks only when an upload targets a LAN address, link-local host, or .local name.
Existing network credentials were moved to the new Android Keystore-backed store.
Saved network credentials cannot be decrypted. Network exports are disabled until you reset them.
Credentials could not be encrypted. Network exports are disabled until you reset them.
Stamp diagonal repeating text on saved images
Resume screenshot monitor after device restart
When ON, recognized app screenshots can auto-redact sensitive text and save into app-specific albums.
When ON, sharing scans for personal data and developer secrets, then lets you review replacements before the share sheet opens.
Add up to 20 local RE2 expressions for identifiers specific to your work.
Describe the format, not a real secret. Lookbehind and backreferences are unsupported. Test text is never saved.
No custom patterns. Strict built-in secret detection remains active.
Runs locally and is never persisted.
Test exceeded the safe time limit
Paste a SnapCrop custom-pattern JSON export. Import replaces the current set only after every entry validates.
Invalid, duplicate, oversized, or unsupported pattern set.
Stored patterns are corrupt. Sensitive-text scans will fail closed until you import or save a valid set.
Opaque fill destroys the selected pixels and is safest. Pixelation is cosmetic concealment and may be partly reversible.
Each numbered region is selected by default. Clear any false positive before sharing.

Protects the editor, Gallery viewer, stitch/collage/frame/video tools, web and long-capture review, floating preview, and Recents from screenshots or recording. Screenshot thumbnails are omitted from notifications. Also blocks your own captures of these surfaces.
SnapCrop found %d area(s) that may contain sensitive info. Share with these pixels replaced using your selected style?
Sensitive-text scanning failed, so SnapCrop did not share the image.
Back up settings, presets, and app rules for reinstall. Network credentials, screenshot notes, and reminders stay on this device.
Restored %1$d settings; migrated %2$d and ignored %3$d unknown/%4$d invalid entries.
Not a valid SnapCrop settings backup.
Tap to view the saved screenshot.
Stored only on this device. Notes and reminders are excluded from Settings backups.
Notifications must be allowed before scheduling a reminder.
Couldn’t save the note or reminder.
That screenshot is no longer available.
Auto-crop, annotate, and redact screenshots instantly.
%1$d crash report(s) saved on this device. Nothing is sent anywhere unless you share it.
Keep up to 200 redacted workflow results for 14 days. Paths, URIs, image/OCR content, credentials, messages, and stack traces are never recorded.
Couldn\'t reach GitHub. Check your connection and try again.
On launch, anonymously check GitHub for a newer release. No account, no tracking — just a version query.
SnapCrop v%1$s is available on GitHub.
Downloads the exact versioned APK asset.
v%1$s is on GitHub. Tap to download.
Built-in and user-trained rules can crop app chrome, then Quick Crop auto-actions can route matching exports.
Rules are saved, but App crop profiles is off.
Preview crop: %1$s left, %2$s top, %3$s right, %4$s bottom
Requires Quick Crop auto-actions. Matching manual editor crops are never silently redacted.
A rule needs a name plus at least one source hint or OCR keyword.
This removes \"%1$s\" from Quick Crop app rules. Existing exported screenshots are not affected.
Copy exports a JSON pack. Import merges pasted profiles by id.
No app rule matched this image
Test image could not be opened
Replacing the source after the crop is written
Writing a separate copy to your save location
Android 11+ moves the source to Trash. Android 10 deletes it permanently. Saved copies and shared exports stay where they are.
This project sidecar does not include a source image URI.
SnapCrop could not open this project sidecar: %1$s
The original image referenced by this project is missing or inaccessible: %1$s
This project file exceeds SnapCrop’s 8 MB safety limit.
This project uses an unsupported schema or version.
This external project has no source fingerprint and cannot be opened safely.
This project contains invalid or excessive editor data.
The saved source is unavailable or is not a trusted media URI. Choose the original image to verify and relink it.
SnapCrop could not read this source image. Choose another copy of the original.
The selected image contents do not match this project. Choose the original source image.
The selected image is %3$d×%4$d, but this project requires %1$d×%2$d. Choose the original source image.
Image saved, but a requested sidecar could not be written. Original retained.
Image saved; a requested sidecar could not be written.
Share, report, rename, resize, or delete
Allow display over other apps in Settings to pin screenshots
Analyze screenshots locally, then review every match before anything moves to trash. Exact and visual fingerprints stay on this device.
Open the newest screenshot, rerun Quick Crop, or browse Gallery without showing private thumbnails.
Open the newest screenshot in the editor
Rerun Quick Crop on the newest screenshot
No duplicate screenshots found at this sensitivity.
Duplicate analysis could not finish. Existing results were kept.
Allow full image access to analyze the complete screenshot library.
Search names, source hints, and indexed categories…
Grant media access or add photos to see them here.
The Gallery is not querying the image library. Pick Image and sharing into SnapCrop still work.
The Gallery shows only images selected through Android.
The Gallery is not querying the video library. Pick Video still works.
The Gallery shows only videos selected through Android.
No matching albums or smart groups
This album is empty or its items are no longer available.
Collection deleted; media was not changed
A collection with that name already exists
Open All Photos, select screenshots, then add them to this collection.
Android will move %1$d selected item(s) to Trash.
Wait for the current media operation to finish
SnapCrop cannot remove this provider’s item
Detected by filename and screen-size signals
Browser, Reddit, X/Twitter, YouTube, social pages
QR, barcode, Wi-Fi, and authenticator screenshots
%1$s — Tap text to review, copy, or translate
Perspective crop: drag corners to correct distortion
Mode: %1$s. Crop %2$d by %3$d at %4$d,%5$d of %6$d by %7$d. Redactions: %8$d. Layers: %9$d. %10$s
Add current annotation at crop center
Use opaque bar for selected redaction
Current draw color, tap to open color picker
Tap rows to multi-select; top layers render last
Draw, place text, or add a callout to create a layer.
Transform isn\'t available for fill, blur, or smart-erase layers.
%1$d selected · tap rows to add or remove
Align selected layers to crop left
Align selected layers to crop center
Align selected layers to crop right
Align selected layers to crop top
Align selected layers to crop middle
Align selected layers to crop bottom
Duplicate selected layers with a visible offset
Project layer or point limit reached
No text found in this image
Correct individual blocks, delete unwanted text, or select two or more blocks to merge them in reading order. Image pixels are never changed.
Tap Add to pick two or more images to stitch together.
Add one more image to create a stitched output.
Pick images to build a collage layout.
Add at least 2 images to save
Empty collage cell %1$d, tap to add image
Pick an image to wrap in a device frame.
Frame saved and opened in editor
Move the scrubber to preview a frame
Trim recordings or grab a frame to edit.
Frames open in the editor. Trimmed clips save to Movies/SnapCrop.
Adjust where the previous frame ends and the next frame starts. The full preview refreshes when you release a slider.
Could not render that join. The last valid preview was kept.

User-initiated HTTPS only. SnapCrop fetches one public HTML document over a public-IP-pinned TLS connection, then renders it in an isolated offline WebView. External images/styles/scripts, private/local addresses, cookies, storage, file access, pop-ups, mixed content, permissions, and downloads are blocked. Page content is never uploaded.
Enter a valid public HTTPS URL.
Page loaded. Review it, then capture the full page.
Static page ready. External resources and scripts were intentionally blocked; review the result before capture.
The public HTTPS document could not be fetched within the safety limits.
The page layout did not stabilize. Retry or use Long Screenshot.
The isolated page renderer stopped. Close and reopen Web Capture to retry.
Private, local, or unresolved destinations are blocked.
That navigation was blocked by the HTTPS/private-network policy.
File downloads are disabled in web capture.
This page is too large to capture safely. Try a shorter page or use Long Screenshot.
The page could not be captured. Review the page and retry.
Long screenshot starts in %1$ds. Open the target screen.
Long screenshot starts now. Keep the screen still.
Tap a color to copy its hex code
Preparing subject segmentation on device. First run may download a Play Services model over Wi-Fi.
Downloading the %1$s translation model over Wi-Fi. Keep the app open and retry if Play Services asks for storage.
Google Play services needs attention (%1$s). Update Play services, free storage if prompted, then retry.
Connect to Wi-Fi so Google Play services can download the %1$s model, then retry.
Free device storage so Google Play services can prepare %1$s, then retry.
Update Google Play services and retry %1$s.
The %1$s model is not ready yet. Connect to Wi-Fi, keep SnapCrop open, and retry.
Enable the local screenshot index in Settings to filter by category.
No indexed categories are available in this album.
%1$d matching screenshots can be added; %2$d other items will be skipped.
Include the source link in this share
This link contains query data that may identify a session or account. Include it only if the recipient should receive the exact URL.
Enter a complete http:// or https:// URL without credentials.
No browser can open this source link
No offline help matches this search.
Only workflow IDs are stored—never media, names, paths, or recognized text.
Show up to six recent workflow shortcuts on Home. Stores only allowlisted workflow IDs and clears history when disabled.
Remove irrelevant source rows or columns non-destructively. Preview shows the squeezed output and seam.
Clear perspective and straighten rotation before editing cut bands.
CUT OUT — edit source bands, then Preview the squeezed result
